summary: Added the recurring_schedules/{id}/ write route (PATCH resume/pause, DELETE) to the embedded brokerage route map, and declared HTTP methods on the previously method-less equity/options order-cancel routes (POST) and ach/transfers (GET+POST).
reason: Recurring-investment writes were unreachable: the map had only the read-side recurring_schedules/ listing, so `brokerage execute` could not resume or pause a schedule. PATCH with {"state":"active"|"paused"} was verified live against the real API. The cancel and ach/transfers routes existed but carried no methods, so execute could not select a verb. The new route is risk=destructive so it stays behind the ROBINHOOD_PP_ALLOW_WRITES dry-run gate; recurring_schedules/{id}/ is a new URL with no read-route collision under the URL-keyed Find.
validated_outcome: go build/vet/test (incl. fresh brokeragemap), verify-skill, and govulncheck all pass; recurring_schedules/{id}/ resolves as destructive and defaults to dry-run without --live-write.
